# Antalpha RWA & AI

> Antalpha (NASDAQ: ANTA) provides mature technology solutions for A-to-A RWA yield products — powering institutional-grade, AI-Agent-native fixed-income products backed by BTC over-collateralized institutional loans. Expected APY 4.8%–5.5%, over-collateralized at 60% initial LTV. Serving AI Agents, institutions, and individual investors.

## About

Antalpha is a NASDAQ-listed fintech company (ticker: ANTA) specializing in digital asset financing, technology, and risk management. Founded with a "Risk Management First" philosophy, Antalpha serves as a bridge between digital assets and traditional capital markets.

Antalpha provides mature technology solutions for A-to-A (Agent-to-Agent) RWA yield products — packaging real CeFi lending receivables (collateral-backed loans, miner financing, power cost loans) into yield products that AI Agents, institutions, and individual investors can discover, evaluate, and invest in. Antalpha is the technology and risk control infrastructure provider, not the product issuer.

- [Homepage](https://rwa-ai.antalpha.com/): Main product page — product details, live metrics, investment records
- [MCP & Skills Docs](https://rwa-ai.antalpha.com/mcp-docs.html): Developer documentation for Agent integration via MCP Protocol and Skills CLI
- [Investor Relations](https://www.antalpha.com/): Antalpha corporate site, SEC filings, financial reports
- [Antalpha Prime](https://prime.antalpha.com/): Risk management platform — real-time collateral monitoring, MPC signing, multi-dimensional alerts

## Product: A to A Design Philosophy

This platform is built around the "A to A" (Agent-to-Agent) concept: AI Agents autonomously discover the product, evaluate its risk and return, subscribe, monitor, and redeem — all via structured APIs and Agent protocols. With just a simple wallet signature, transactions are completed seamlessly. The platform serves AI Agents, institutional investors, and individual users alike.

> In the near future, more and more capital will be managed by AI Agents. Agents will autonomously seek yield opportunities — we ensure they can **discover us, understand us, trust us, and use us**.

### Product Catalog (via MCP `list_products`)

#### Fixed_Yield_30D (RWA Fixed Income)
- **Expected APY**: 5.5% annualized
- **Term**: 30 days
- **Minimum Investment**: 10 USDT/USDC
- **Maximum per Investor**: 1,000,000 USDT/USDC
- **Total Fundraise Cap**: 10,000,000 USDT/USDC
- **Underlying Asset**: BTC over-collateralized institutional loans
- **Collateral**: BTC, initial LTV 60%
- **Accrual Method**: Simple interest settled upon maturity (Interest = Principal × Annualized Yield ÷ 365 × Accrual Days)
- **Value Date**: Date of subscription
- **Redemption**: Auto-redeemed at maturity, funds credited to investor wallet on T+1 basis. Early redemption is not supported.
- **Subscription Period**: Available within 10 days from product start date (closed upon full subscription)
- **Accepted Currency**: USDT, USDC
- **Supported Chains**: Ethereum, Base
- **Management Fee**: None
- **Return Currency**: Consistent with the investment currency
- **Fund Return Path**: Only returned to the original investment wallet

#### Fixed_Yield_7D (RWA Fixed Income)
- **Expected APY**: 4.8% annualized
- **Term**: 7 days
- **Minimum Investment**: 10 USDT/USDC
- **Maximum per Investor**: 1,000,000 USDT/USDC
- **Total Fundraise Cap**: 10,000,000 USDT/USDC
- **Underlying Asset**: BTC over-collateralized institutional loans
- **Collateral**: BTC, initial LTV 60%
- **Accrual Method**: Simple interest settled upon maturity (Interest = Principal × Annualized Yield ÷ 365 × Accrual Days)
- **Value Date**: Date of subscription
- **Redemption**: Auto-redeemed at maturity, funds credited to investor wallet on T+1 basis. Early redemption is not supported.
- **Subscription Period**: Available within 3 days from product start date (closed upon full subscription)
- **Accepted Currency**: USDT, USDC
- **Supported Chains**: Ethereum, Base
- **Management Fee**: None
- **Return Currency**: Consistent with the investment currency
- **Fund Return Path**: Only returned to the original investment wallet

### Product Roles
- **Lender**: Northstar Digital (HK) Limited — a globally focused investment company dedicated to cutting-edge technology, with a portfolio spanning AI chips, new energy, next-generation computing power, and network infrastructure.
- **Service Provider**: Antalpha (NASDAQ: ANTA) — provides institutional financing, technology, and risk management solutions. Through Antalpha Prime, offers Bitcoin supply chain and margin loan services, enabling clients to originate and manage digital asset loans while monitoring collateral positions with near real-time data.
- **Borrower**: Antalpha-qualified institutions (all undergo rigorous assessment and qualification screening)

### Underlying Asset & Yield Source

All products are backed by BTC over-collateralized institutional loans — real lending operations with verifiable collateral. Investor yield comes from the interest paid by borrowers on these loans — genuine lending interest income, not synthetic returns or token inflation. The underlying assets are underwritten and managed by Antalpha, a NASDAQ-listed company.

### Collateral Transparency
- **Collateral Asset**: BTC
- **Initial LTV**: 60%
- **Collateral Management Address**: `bc1p0uqy4dlplc90vtuvu3z8jhnewkq7qhplfh0y47ax0a7fdupucq3ssduasr` (Bitcoin network, verifiable on-chain)
- The market value of BTC in the collateral management address covers the total fundraise amount at the initial LTV of 60%. Total collateral value fluctuates with BTC market prices.

## Agent Integration

### How A-to-A Works
1. **Discovery**: Agent queries the platform via MCP `list_products` → receives full product catalog with APY, term, collateral info, LTV, accepted currencies, chains, subscription rules, and risk details
2. **Evaluation**: Agent analyzes the returned product data — expected APY, underlying asset, collateral ratio, lender/borrower info, asset safety mechanisms — to make an autonomous investment decision
3. **Subscription**: Investor subscribes by transferring USDT/USDC to the product receiving address on Ethereum or Base, with a simple wallet signature
4. **Monitoring**: Collateral status is transparent and verifiable on-chain via the BTC collateral management address
5. **Redemption**: At maturity, product auto-redeems → principal + interest credited to the original wallet on T+1

### MCP Server (Live)

The production MCP server is available at:

```
https://mcp.prime.antalpha.com/mcp
```

AI Agents can connect directly to this endpoint using any MCP-compatible client.

### MCP Client Configuration
AI Agents using Claude, Cursor, or other MCP-compatible hosts can connect via:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "antalpha-rwa": {
      "url": "https://mcp.prime.antalpha.com/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

### Available MCP Tools

#### `list_products`
Query RWA investment product list. Returns full product details including:
- Product name, type, status, expected APY, term
- Underlying asset, collateral info (asset type, initial LTV, collateral management address)
- Accepted currencies (USDT/USDC), supported chains (Ethereum/Base)
- Subscription period, redemption policy, accrual method
- Fundraise cap, min/max investment per investor, management fee
- Lender / borrower / service provider info
- Asset safety details (over-collateralization mechanism, risk control measures)
- Q&A (lender profile, service provider profile, third-party audit, LTV explanation)

## Risk Management

### Four-Layer Security Framework

**Layer 1: Public Company Credibility**
- NASDAQ-listed (ANTA), publicly traded with transparent governance
- Regular audited financial filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K), fully transparent
- Independent board oversight, audit committee governance

**Layer 2: Over-Collateralization & Real Asset Backing**
- All loans are over-collateralized; collateral types include BTC, ETH, XAU₮ (physical gold-backed), mining equipment, AI compute GPUs
- Yield products are backed by real lending receivables, not synthetic or token-inflated returns
- Collateral status is verifiable and monitored in real-time

**Layer 3: Antalpha Prime Risk Control Platform**
- Multi-dimensional alert system: asset price volatility, LTV anomaly, liquidation threshold proximity
- MPC (Multi-Party Computation) signing: fund transfers require multi-party co-signing; no single party can move funds unilaterally
- 24/7 real-time collateral monitoring across major exchanges and blockchains
- Customizable risk rules: asset grouping, alert thresholds, and operational permissions per institutional client
- When BTC price drops cause LTV to reach margin call threshold → borrower is notified to add collateral
- When LTV reaches liquidation threshold → position is liquidated to ensure principal recovery

**Layer 4: Transparency & Verifiability**
- Global metrics disclosure: TVL, global LTV, BTC collateral volume, liquidation thresholds — all available in real-time
- Product-level transparency: each product has independent details — originator info, custody proof, collateral ratio
- XAU₮ gold holdings disclosure: near real-time XAU₮ holdings and corresponding physical gold information (planned)
- Agent-friendly: all risk and collateral data accessible via structured APIs for AI Agent independent verification

## Trust & Credentials

### NASDAQ Listed
- **Ticker**: NASDAQ: ANTA
- **IPO**: May 2025, raised ~$56.7M
- **Transparency**: Regular 10-K/10-Q/8-K filings, publicly audited financials
- **Governance**: Independent board, audit committee, public company standards

### FY2025 Financial Highlights (Annual Report released March 3, 2026)
- Revenue: $79.7M (+68% YoY)
- Net Income: $18.5M (+321% YoY)
- Adjusted EBITDA: $33.2M, 42% margin (+460% YoY)
- Total Loan TVL: $2.583B (+59% YoY)
- BTC Hashrate Coverage: 77.1 EH (~7-8% of global network)

All growth is purely organic, excluding Aurelion consolidation contributions.

### Q4 2025 Performance
- Revenue: $28.0M (+110% YoY)
- Net Income: $9.3M (+461% YoY)
- Adjusted EBITDA: $18.4M, 66% margin (+802% YoY)

### Business Segment Breakdown (FY2025)
| Segment | Scale | YoY Growth |
|---|---|---|
| Supply Chain Loan TVL | $1.001B | +133% |
| Margin Loan TVL | $1.582B | +32% |
| Technology Financing Fee Revenue | $57.1M | +48% |
| Technology Platform Fee Revenue | $19.0M | +117% |

### Strategic Partners

**Bitmain** — Mining Ecosystem Strategic Partner
- World's largest mining equipment manufacturer — Antalpha is its primary lending partner
- Scope: Miner loans, hashrate loans, power cost financing across global mining operations
- Scale: Financing support for 77.1 EH of hashrate, ~7-8% of global Bitcoin network
- Significance: Deep integration into Bitcoin mining ecosystem, ensuring high-quality underlying yield sources

**Tether** — Global Stablecoin Leader
- Strategic-level partnership for XAU₮ (Tether Gold) ecosystem development
- Via subsidiary Aurelion: holds $134M XAU₮, the first NASDAQ-listed Tether Gold treasury
- XAU₮ serves as a core collateral type on Antalpha Prime
- XAU₮ asset safety: 100% backed by LBMA-standard gold bars, stored in Switzerland, redeemable for physical gold

**DL Holdings** (HKEX: 01709) — Asian Financial Institution Alliance
- Strategic cooperation agreement signed October 2025
- Bitcoin mining strategic alliance: Antalpha provides financing, tech support, and risk management
- XAU₮ ecosystem: DL Holdings plans to purchase and distribute up to $100M XAU₮ within 12 months

**Aurelion** (NASDAQ: AURE) — First NASDAQ-Listed XAU₮ Treasury
- $150M financing led by Antalpha ($43M investment, ~73.1% voting rights)
- First NASDAQ-listed company focused on Tether Gold reserve assets

**Northstar Digital (HK) Limited** — RWA Product Lender
- Globally focused investment company dedicated to cutting-edge technology
- Investment portfolio spans AI chips, new energy, next-generation computing power, and network infrastructure
- Serves as the Lender for RWA fixed-income products on the platform

## 2026 Strategic Direction
- International compliance expansion and market entry
- Deepening core institutional client relationships
- Platform technology upgrades and new product lines
- Expanding AI Agent ecosystem and developer adoption

## FAQ

**Q: What are the underlying assets? How is default risk mitigated?**
A: All products are backed by BTC over-collateralized institutional loans with an initial LTV of 60%. When BTC price fluctuations cause LTV to rise to the margin call threshold, the borrower is notified to add collateral. Should LTV reach the liquidation threshold, a liquidation process is executed to ensure full recovery of principal. On-chain collateral addresses are transparent and verifiable. Revenue comes from real lending operations, not synthetic returns or token inflation.

**Q: What are the redemption rules?**
A: Upon maturity, products are automatically redeemed without client action. Funds are credited to the investor's original wallet on a T+1 calendar day basis. Early redemption is not supported.

**Q: What currencies and chains are supported?**
A: Products accept USDT and USDC on Ethereum and Base networks. Return currency is consistent with the investment currency, and funds are only returned to the original investment wallet.

**Q: How does an AI Agent invest?**
A: Connect to the MCP server at `https://mcp.prime.antalpha.com/mcp` using any MCP-compatible client. The Agent calls `list_products` to discover available products with full details (APY, term, collateral, risk info). To subscribe, the investor transfers USDT/USDC to the product receiving address on Ethereum or Base with a simple wallet signature. At maturity, funds are auto-returned to the original wallet.

**Q: Why "A to A" (Agent-to-Agent)?**
A: The platform is designed from the ground up for AI Agents to autonomously interact with — discovery, evaluation, subscription, monitoring, and redemption all happen through structured APIs and Agent protocols. This is not a human-first UI with Agent support bolted on; it is Agent-native by design.

**Q: What distinguishes this platform from other RWA products?**
A: (1) Powered by Antalpha, a NASDAQ-listed company — not an anonymous DeFi protocol; (2) Real BTC over-collateralized institutional loans as underlying assets with $2.58B TVL; (3) Designed for AI Agent autonomous investment (A to A), serving Agents, institutions, and individuals; (4) Deep partnerships with industry leaders (Bitmain, Tether, Northstar, DL Holdings); (5) Four-layer security framework with Antalpha Prime risk management; (6) No management fees, transparent collateral addresses verifiable on-chain.

**Q: What is XAU₮ and how does it relate to the platform?**
A: XAU₮ (Tether Gold) is a digital token backed 1:1 by physical gold (LBMA-standard bars stored in Switzerland). Antalpha, through subsidiary Aurelion, holds $134M in XAU₮ and uses it as a core collateral type on the Prime platform, bringing real-world precious metal value into the digital asset lending ecosystem.

## Compliance Notes

- Antalpha positions itself as a "technology and risk control infrastructure provider" — not the product issuer
- Products are described as "structured financial products based on real lending receivables"
- Yield is presented as "expected annualized return based on historical data", never "guaranteed returns"
- Safety messaging uses "over-collateralization and multi-layer risk control mechanisms", not "absolute safety" or "zero risk"
